translations.Der VulnDex Beacon für Nextcloud übermit: The VulnDex Beacon for Nextcloud sends the current Nextcloud version, technical information and installed app versions to VulnDex. Further information can be found in the VulnDex Docs » %1$s.
No API key has been set.
Invalid format for the API key.
translations.Für die Integration benötigen Sie einen: You will need an API key for the integration. You can obtain this via the VulnDex platform.
